  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "from google.colab import files\n",
        "uploaded = files.upload()\n",
        "# WEB APP ANALYTICS - DATA ANALYSIS & VISUALIZATION\n",
        "# Dataset: web_app_analytics_100_records.csv\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "import warnings\n",
        "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 1. LOADING THE DATASET\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "# ERROR FIX: FileNotFoundError - The file 'web_app_analytics_100_records.csv' was not found.\n",
        "# Please ensure the file is uploaded to your Colab environment or provide the correct path.\n",
        "# You can upload the file by clicking the folder icon on the left sidebar -> Upload.\n",
        "# If the file is hosted online, you can use `!wget` to download it.\n",
        "df = pd.read_csv(\"web_app_analytics.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"DATASET LOADED SUCCESSFULLY\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(f\"Shape: {df.shape[0]} rows x {df.shape[1]} columns\")\n",
        "print(\"\\nFirst 5 rows:\")\n",
        "print(df.head())\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 2. UNDERSTANDING THE DATA\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"DATASET INFO\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(df.info())\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(df.describe())\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"MISSING VALUES\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(df.isnull().sum())\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"DUPLICATE ROWS:\", df.duplicated().sum())\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 3. DATA CLEANING\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "# Remove duplicates (if any)\n",
        "df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Fill missing values (if any) with median for numeric columns\n",
        "for col in df.select_dtypes(include='number').columns:\n",
        "    df[col].fillna(df[col].median(), inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nData cleaning complete. Shape after cleaning:\", df.shape)\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 4. FEATURE CREATION (NEW COLUMN)\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "# Classify session duration into categories\n",
        "def classify_session(duration):\n",
        "    if duration < 60:\n",
        "        return 'Short'\n",
        "    elif duration < 150:\n",
        "        return 'Medium'\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        return 'Long'\n",
        "\n",
        "df['session_category'] = df['session_duration_sec'].apply(classify_session)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"NEW FEATURE: session_category\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(df['session_category'].value_counts())\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 5. AGGREGATE FUNCTIONS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"AGGREGATE ANALYSIS\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(f\"Mean Session Duration : {df['session_duration_sec'].mean():.2f} sec\")\n",
        "print(f\"Max Clicks            : {df['clicks'].max()}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Min Clicks            : {df['clicks'].min()}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Sum of Conversions    : {df['conversion'].sum()}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Mean Scroll Percent   : {df['scroll_percent'].mean():.2f} %\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Bounce Count    : {df['bounce'].sum()}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 6. GROUP ANALYSIS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"GROUP ANALYSIS: Average Session Duration by Page\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(df.groupby('page')['session_duration_sec'].mean().round(2))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nConversion Rate by Device:\")\n",
        "print(df.groupby('device')['conversion'].mean().round(3))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nAverage Clicks by Page:\")\n",
        "print(df.groupby('page')['clicks'].mean().round(2))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nBounce Rate by Device:\")\n",
        "print(df.groupby('device')['bounce'].mean().round(3))\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 7. UNIVARIATE ANALYSIS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))\n",
        "fig.suptitle(\"Univariate Analysis\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Histogram - Session Duration\n",
        "axes[0].hist(df['session_duration_sec'], bins=15, color='steelblue', edgecolor='white')\n",
        "axes[0].set_title(\"Distribution of Session Duration\")\n",
        "axes[0].set_xlabel(\"Session Duration (sec)\")\n",
        "axes[0].set_ylabel(\"Number of Users\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Boxplot - Scroll Percent\n",
        "axes[1].boxplot(df['scroll_percent'], patch_artist=True,\n",
        "                boxprops=dict(facecolor='lightgreen', color='green'))\n",
        "axes[1].set_title(\"Boxplot of Scroll Percent\")\n",
        "axes[1].set_ylabel(\"Scroll Percent (%)\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.savefig(\"univariate_analysis.png\", dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "print(\"\\nUnivariate plot saved as 'univariate_analysis.png'\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 8. BIVARIATE ANALYSIS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))\n",
        "fig.suptitle(\"Bivariate Analysis\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Scatter plot - Clicks vs Session Duration\n",
        "colors = df['conversion'].map({0: 'steelblue', 1: 'tomato'})\n",
        "axes[0].scatter(df['clicks'], df['session_duration_sec'], c=colors, alpha=0.7)\n",
        "axes[0].set_title(\"Clicks vs Session Duration\\n(Red = Converted)\")\n",
        "axes[0].set_xlabel(\"Clicks\")\n",
        "axes[0].set_ylabel(\"Session Duration (sec)\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Boxplot - Session Duration by Conversion\n",
        "df.boxplot(column='session_duration_sec', by='conversion', ax=axes[1],\n",
        "           patch_artist=True)\n",
        "axes[1].set_title(\"Session Duration by Conversion\")\n",
        "axes[1].set_xlabel(\"Conversion (0=No, 1=Yes)\")\n",
        "axes[1].set_ylabel(\"Session Duration (sec)\")\n",
        "plt.suptitle(\"\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.savefig(\"bivariate_analysis.png\", dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "print(\"Bivariate plot saved as 'bivariate_analysis.png'\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 9. MULTIVARIATE ANALYSIS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "# Heatmap - Correlation\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))\n",
        "numeric_cols = df.select_dtypes(include='number').drop(columns=['user_id'])\n",
        "corr = numeric_cols.corr()\n",
        "sns.heatmap(corr, annot=True, fmt=\".2f\", cmap=\"coolwarm\",\n",
        "            linewidths=0.5, square=True)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Correlation Heatmap\", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.savefig(\"heatmap.png\", dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "print(\"Heatmap saved as 'heatmap.png'\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Pairplot\n",
        "pair_cols = ['session_duration_sec', 'clicks', 'scroll_percent', 'conversion']\n",
        "pairplot_df = df[pair_cols].copy()\n",
        "pairplot_df['conversion'] = pairplot_df['conversion'].astype(str)\n",
        "sns_pair = sns.pairplot(pairplot_df, hue='conversion',\n",
        "                        palette={'0': 'steelblue', '1': 'tomato'})\n",
        "sns_pair.figure.suptitle(\"Pairplot of Web Analytics Variables\", y=1.02,\n",
        "                          fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.savefig(\"pairplot.png\", dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "print(\"Pairplot saved as 'pairplot.png'\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 10. ADDITIONAL VISUALIZATIONS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(16, 5))\n",
        "fig.suptitle(\"Page & Device Breakdown\", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Bar chart - Users per Page\n",
        "page_counts = df['page'].value_counts()\n",
        "axes[0].bar(page_counts.index, page_counts.values, color='mediumpurple', edgecolor='white')\n",
        "axes[0].set_title(\"Users per Page\")\n",
        "axes[0].set_xlabel(\"Page\")\n",
        "axes[0].set_ylabel(\"Count\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Pie chart - Device distribution\n",
        "device_counts = df['device'].value_counts()\n",
        "axes[1].pie(device_counts.values, labels=device_counts.index,\n",
        "            autopct='%1.1f%%', startangle=140,\n",
        "            colors=['#4e79a7', '#f28e2b', '#e15759'])\n",
        "axes[1].set_title(\"Device Distribution\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Bar chart - Conversion by Page\n",
        "conv_by_page = df.groupby('page')['conversion'].mean() * 100\n",
        "axes[2].bar(conv_by_page.index, conv_by_page.values, color='mediumseagreen', edgecolor='white')\n",
        "axes[2].set_title(\"Conversion Rate (%) by Page\")\n",
        "axes[2].set_xlabel(\"Page\")\n",
        "axes[2].set_ylabel(\"Conversion Rate (%)\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.savefig(\"page_device_breakdown.png\", dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "print(\"Page & Device breakdown plot saved as 'page_device_breakdown.png'\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# 11. SUMMARY INSIGHTS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(\"KEY INSIGHTS\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)\n",
        "print(f\"1. Total Users Analyzed       : {len(df)}\")\n",
        "print(f\"2. Overall Conversion Rate    : {df['conversion'].mean()*100:.1f}%\")\n",
        "print(f\"3. Overall Bounce Rate        : {df['bounce'].mean()*100:.1f}%\")\n",
        "print(f\"4. Avg Session Duration       : {df['session_duration_sec'].mean():.0f} sec\")\n",
        "print(f\"5. Avg Scroll Depth           : {df['scroll_percent'].mean():.1f}%\")\n",
        "print(f\"6. Highest Converting Page    : {df.groupby('page')['conversion'].mean().idxmax()}\")\n",
        "print(f\"7. Most Used Device           : {df['device'].value_counts().idxmax()}\")\n",
        "print(f\"8. Device with Best Conv Rate : {df.groupby('device')['conversion'].mean().idxmax()}\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 60)"
      ],
      "metadata": {

              "\n",
              "     <input type=\"file\" id=\"files-8b732346-8fde-4671-ba5d-02decb0186c1\" name=\"files[]\" multiple disabled\n",

              "     <output id=\"result-8b732346-8fde-4671-ba5d-02decb0186c1\">\n",

              "      current browser session. Please rerun this cell to enable.\n",
              "      </output>\n",
              "      <script>// Copyright 2017 Google LLC\n",
              "//\n",

              "// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n",
              "// You may obtain a copy of the License at\n",

              "// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n",
              "// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n",
              "// limitations under the License.\n",
              "\n",
              "/**\n",
              " * @fileoverview Helpers for google.colab Python module.\n",
              " */\n",
              "(function(scope) {\n",
              "function span(text, styleAttributes = {}) {\n",
              "  const element = document.createElement('span');\n",
              "  element.textContent = text;\n",
              "  for (const key of Object.keys(styleAttributes)) {\n",
              "    element.style[key] = styleAttributes[key];\n",
              "  }\n",
              "  return element;\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "// Max number of bytes which will be uploaded at a time.\n",
              "const MAX_PAYLOAD_SIZE = 100 * 1024;\n",
              "\n",
              "function _uploadFiles(inputId, outputId) {\n",
              "  const steps = uploadFilesStep(inputId, outputId);\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  // Cache steps on the outputElement to make it available for the next call\n",
              "  // to uploadFilesContinue from Python.\n",
              "  outputElement.steps = steps;\n",
              "\n",
              "  return _uploadFilesContinue(outputId);\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "// This is roughly an async generator (not supported in the browser yet),\n",
              "// where there are multiple asynchronous steps and the Python side is going\n",
              "// to poll for completion of each step.\n",
              "// This uses a Promise to block the python side on completion of each step,\n",
              "// then passes the result of the previous step as the input to the next step.\n",
              "function _uploadFilesContinue(outputId) {\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  const steps = outputElement.steps;\n",
              "\n",
              "  const next = steps.next(outputElement.lastPromiseValue);\n",
              "  return Promise.resolve(next.value.promise).then((value) => {\n",
              "    // Cache the last promise value to make it available to the next\n",
              "    // step of the generator.\n",
              "    outputElement.lastPromiseValue = value;\n",
              "    return next.value.response;\n",
              "  });\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "/**\n",
              " * Generator function which is called between each async step of the upload\n",
              " * process.\n",
              " * @param {string} inputId Element ID of the input file picker element.\n",
              " * @param {string} outputId Element ID of the output display.\n",
              " * @return {!Iterable<!Object>} Iterable of next steps.\n",
              " */\n",
              "function* uploadFilesStep(inputId, outputId) {\n",
              "  const inputElement = document.getElementById(inputId);\n",
              "  inputElement.disabled = false;\n",
              "\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  outputElement.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "\n",
              "  const pickedPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "    inputElement.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n",
              "      resolve(e.target.files);\n",
              "    });\n",
              "  });\n",
              "\n",
              "  const cancel = document.createElement('button');\n",
              "  inputElement.parentElement.appendChild(cancel);\n",
              "  cancel.textContent = 'Cancel upload';\n",
              "  const cancelPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "    cancel.onclick = () => {\n",
              "      resolve(null);\n",
              "    };\n",
              "  });\n",
              "\n",
              "  // Wait for the user to pick the files.\n",
              "  const files = yield {\n",
              "    promise: Promise.race([pickedPromise, cancelPromise]),\n",
              "    response: {\n",
              "      action: 'starting',\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  };\n",
              "\n",
              "  cancel.remove();\n",
              "\n",
              "  // Disable the input element since further picks are not allowed.\n",
              "  inputElement.disabled = true;\n",
              "\n",
              "  if (!files) {\n",
              "    return {\n",
              "      response: {\n",
              "        action: 'complete',\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    };\n",
              "  }\n",
              "\n",
              "  for (const file of files) {\n",
              "    const li = document.createElement('li');\n",
              "    li.append(span(file.name, {fontWeight: 'bold'}));\n",
              "    li.append(span(\n",
              "        `(${file.type || 'n/a'}) - ${file.size} bytes, ` +\n",
              "        `last modified: ${\n",
              "            file.lastModifiedDate ? file.lastModifiedDate.toLocaleDateString() :\n",
              "                                    'n/a'} - `));\n",
              "    const percent = span('0% done');\n",
              "    li.appendChild(percent);\n",
              "\n",
              "    outputElement.appendChild(li);\n",
              "\n",
              "    const fileDataPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "      const reader = new FileReader();\n",
              "      reader.onload = (e) => {\n",
              "        resolve(e.target.result);\n",
              "      };\n",
              "      reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);\n",
              "    });\n",
              "    // Wait for the data to be ready.\n",
              "    let fileData = yield {\n",
              "      promise: fileDataPromise,\n",
              "      response: {\n",
              "        action: 'continue',\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    };\n",
              "\n",
              "    // Use a chunked sending to avoid message size limits. See b/62115660.\n",
              "    let position = 0;\n",
              "    do {\n",
              "      const length = Math.min(fileData.byteLength - position, MAX_PAYLOAD_SIZE);\n",
              "      const chunk = new Uint8Array(fileData, position, length);\n",
              "      position += length;\n",
              "\n",
              "      const base64 = btoa(String.fromCharCode.apply(null, chunk));\n",
              "      yield {\n",
              "        response: {\n",
              "          action: 'append',\n",
              "          file: file.name,\n",
              "          data: base64,\n",
              "        },\n",
              "      };\n",
              "\n",
              "      let percentDone = fileData.byteLength === 0 ?\n",
              "          100 :\n",
              "          Math.round((position / fileData.byteLength) * 100);\n",
              "      percent.textContent = `${percentDone}% done`;\n",
              "\n",
              "    } while (position < fileData.byteLength);\n",
              "  }\n",
              "\n",
              "  // All done.\n",
              "  yield {\n",
              "    response: {\n",
              "      action: 'complete',\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  };\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "scope.google = scope.google || {};\n",
              "scope.google.colab = scope.google.colab || {};\n",
              "scope.google.colab._files = {\n",
              "  _uploadFiles,\n",
              "  _uploadFilesContinue,\n",
              "};\n",
              "})(self);\n",
              "</script> "
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
